title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Kalshi in early IPO talks with investment banks: Report
summary: The prediction market platform is reportedly exploring a public listing after surpassing $2 billion in annualized revenue as sports contracts face mounting legal scrutiny.

title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.

title: Custodia, Vantage propose token that toggles between bank deposits and stablecoins
summary: The proposed system aims to connect traditional banking infrastructure with blockchain-based payment networks with banks retaining customer deposits.

title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
summary: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

title: The 11 standout startups from YC’s Demo Day, according to VCs
summary: TechCrunch spoke to investors to find the hottest startups in the Spring 2026 YC batch. Some of them commanded valuations of over $175 million, VCs said.

title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
summary: The startup trains embodied AI and world models using Medal’s dataset of 2 billion videos per year from 10 million monthly active users.
